Small fixes on top of v1.2.0.

## Fixed
- **Settings Apply button stayed greyed out after Ollama Autodetect.** Autodetect fills the URL/model fields programmatically, which Unraid didn't notice — the fields now announce their change so Apply enables.

## Changed
- **Update and Repository buttons** in the changelog bubble now use the Unraid accent: an orange outline that fills on hover.

## Install / update
Update from the Plugins tab, or install by URL:
`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg`
